subcodes.first_line: O ye two cherished handmaidens of the Court of Divine Unity! Your noble father, praise be to God, hath become a star in the heaven of martyrdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز عزیز درگاه احدیت پدر بزرگوار الحمد لله در افق شهادت کبری کوکب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation
